title: Senior Doctor - SRL Diagnostics - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - SRL Diagnostics - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? SRL Diagnostics in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SRL Diagnostics:
SRL Diagnostics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRL Diagnostics!
